entries.parsedImagePrompt: Medium shot, eye-level angle, static frame. 3 distinct characters with completely different outfits and features, standing separately with clear space between them: On the left of the frame, a young woman in her early twenties with a sharp jawline, slanted phoenix eyes, thin lips, straight black hair, slim build, wearing a white button-up shirt and silver watch, her eyebrow raised, lips curved in a half-smile, hands on hips, posture relaxed and confident. On the right of the frame, a middle-aged man with sharp brows, narrow eyes, gray hair combed back, sturdy build, wearing a dark green polo shirt, his head bowed, eyes cast downward, shoulders slumped, hands clasped nervously. In the center background, a young man in his early twenties with a heart-shaped face, defined jawline, sparkling almond eyes, high nose bridge, soft full lips, black wavy center-parted hair, tall lean build, wearing a white oxford shirt with rolled sleeves, leaning forward slightly, eyes narrowed with interest, lips pursed in thought. The background is a Tết festival ring toss booth, with a foreground counter and onlookers, a midground player area fenced by railing, and a background wall adorned with prizes; a bag sits on the floor. Lighting is front soft light, soft even quality, warm calm color tone, medium depth of field. Artwork in CG style with Iray skin rendering, realistic physical light and shadow, translucent rosy smooth skin texture, cinematic render quality, 2.5D semi-realistic style. Smooth radiant skin texture, sharply defined facial features, clear sparkling eyes with natural highlights, cinematic portrait quality.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] The scene is set at a Tết festival ring toss booth. In the foreground, a counter with onlookers. The midground consists of a player area bounded by a wooden railing. In the background, a prize wall. A bag lies on the floor. The environment is static and remains unchanged throughout.
[Characters]
Bạch Ngưng Băng: Upper body of an early-twenties female with sharp jawline, slanted phoenix eyes, thin lips, straight black hair, wearing a white button-up shirt and silver watch. Emotional state: calm and confident.
Ông chủ: Upper body of a middle-aged male with sharp brows, narrow eyes, gray hair combed back, sturdy build, wearing a dark green polo shirt. Emotional state: defeated and nervous.
Tôi: Upper body of an early-twenties male with heart-shaped face, defined jawline, sparkling almond eyes, high nose bridge, soft full lips, black wavy center-parted hair, wearing a white oxford shirt with rolled sleeves. Emotional state: curious and observant.
Shot 1 (Medium Shot, 3.39s): Static camera, environment remains unchanged.
Bạch Ngưng Băng: "I bought fifty rings, only threw twenty."
Action: She delivers the line coolly, her lips moving subtly while her eyebrow remains raised. The booth owner keeps his head bowed, shoulders slumped, hands clasped nervously. In the background, Tôi watches with narrowed eyes, leaning slightly forward.
